title: Test suite exceeds spec (10 tests vs 3 required)
evidence: handlers_test.go has 10 test functions: TestHealth, TestCreateAndGetBook, TestCreateBookValidation, TestListBooksWithAuthorFilter, TestUpdateBook, TestDeleteBook, TestGetBookNotFound, TestInvalidIDReturns400, TestMethodNotAllowed, TestMalformedJSON
suggestion: No action needed — thorough testing is a positive signal

title: Robust error handling beyond spec
evidence: handlers.go:62-69 validates path segments and returns 400 for non-numeric IDs; handlers.go:38-41 rejects non-GET on /health with 405; handlers.go:97 uses DisallowUnknownFields for strict JSON parsing
suggestion: No action needed — defensive error handling is good practice
